title: Visibility of Updated timestamp in Integrations/Automations lists
excerpt: Please make it easier to see the “Updated” timestamp in the Board Integrations and Board Automations lists. The date is supposed to pop up when you hover in that area but it often will not work and it is impossible to se…

posts.author: jwingstrom (Jeff Wingstrom)
posts.cookedHtml: Please make it easier to see the “Updated” timestamp in the Board Integrations and Board Automations lists. The date is supposed to pop up when you hover in that area but it often will not work and it is impossible to see the Updated timestamp. There doesn’t seem to be any reason this text can’t be moved left into a sea of empty space so that we can just see the Updated timestamp every time and without additional action. I would lovelove to be told I’m missing something here because it’s incredibly frustrating. Cheers!
